  • emoji_people About Me

Adam Krueger - Design Leader

From Signals to Systems: Designing Intelligent Products at Scale

I design products that need to hold up under scale, complexity, and scrutiny. That means thinking beyond flows and features to the systems, patterns, and decisions that shape how a product evolves.

I’m drawn to ambiguous spaces where direction is still forming. I help teams clarify intent, align around what matters, and build experiences that feel inevitable in hindsight.

I care about craft, but I care more about coherence. The goal is not just to ship something good, but to raise the quality bar in a way that lasts.

Still curious. Still refining. Always aiming for better judgment.

Featured Case Studies

View all

SaaS Platform · B2B

Enterprise Dashboard Overhaul

Reframed analytics hierarchy, reduced cognitive load, and increased daily active usage.

Mobile Banking · Fintech

Funds Transfer Redesign

Introduced progressive disclosure that cut support tickets tied to transfer errors.

HealthTech · Service Design

Patient Intake Experience

Mapped end-to-end service touchpoints to improve completion and reduce administrative overhead.
